overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player walks along neon-lit sidewalks, crosses a large intersection, and enters a covered walkway with digital billboards overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with palm trees and digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked covered sidewalk next to a busy street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall palm tree with wet fronds lining the sidewalk
illuminated digital display showing advertisements on the sidewalk edge
tall futuristic glass building with illuminated windows rising in the background
large glowing billboard with colorful neon advertisements on building facade
orange safety railing separating sidewalk from lower level

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain. Palm trees line the path while digital advertisement kiosks and neon billboards illuminate the scene. The wet concrete reflects the colorful lights from the surrounding glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: exiting covered sidewalk and entering open intersection with crosswalk
crossing the wide intersection following yellow striped crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection alongside other pedestrians while holding an umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with WAIT text visible
red traffic signal and pedestrian crossing light on metal pole
illuminated sign indicating Japantown district entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with heavy rain falling. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside another pedestrian carrying an umbrella. Tall glass buildings with neon signage surround the intersection, and a Japantown sign becomes visible on the left as the crossing continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with overhead digital displays and orange flooring

events.description: entering covered walkway with overhead structure and orange textured flooring

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway with orange textured flooring, following a pedestrian with an umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking ahead under the covered walkway

entered.detail: futuristic covered walkway with curved roof and integrated lighting
large digital billboard mounted overhead displaying advertisements
distinctive orange metal textured pavement with diamond plate pattern
silver metal safety railing along the right side of the walkway
red painted structural supports at the walkway entrance

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered pedestrian walkway that provides shelter from the rain. The walkway features distinctive orange textured flooring and large digital billboards mounted overhead. The environment feels more enclosed with metal railings and futuristic architecture, while the pedestrian with the umbrella continues walking ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, moving from an open neon-lit sidewalk into a sheltered urban corridor. It begins along a covered path lined with palm trees, where digital kiosks and neon billboards cast vibrant reflections across the wet concrete. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a wide, rain-swept intersection, crossing yellow-striped pavement alongside a pedestrian with an umbrella while a Japantown sign emerges among the surrounding glass skyscrapers. The movement then shifts as the camera enters a covered pedestrian walkway, transitioning from the open storm to an enclosed space with orange textured flooring and massive overhead digital billboards. Finally, the environment tightens around metal railings and futuristic architecture as the distant pedestrian continues walking ahead.
